messages.content: # Blue Screen when loading into a map? Follow this guide!

## If you are having issues with a blue screen, with weird blue triangles, a full blue screen, or CPU 99% and a black screen and wild wheel on Horizon or 415, this is caused by your re-shade.

## Method 1
> You can either downgrade to Reshade 5.92 or delete it. To delete it simply run the installer again and there will be a way to delete it there.

## If it is ONLY the car that is in blue triangles then that is a car issue, not a re-shade issue.
> Follow <#1440122305861652520>  to fix that issue.

__**Reshade versions 6 and above ONLY work with CSP 0.2.3p211 (the one with linear colour space) and above**__
